title: Looking for Category Manager at Shiprocket

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Shiprocket
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
